name: misell
description: Misell signage delivery QA and CI orchestration.

scripts.test:ci: npm run check:player && npm --prefix apps/player run smoke:local-state && npm --prefix apps/player run smoke:content-apply && npm run validate:playlist && npm run check:cloud && npm --prefix apps/cloud run smoke:backup && npm --prefix apps/cloud run smoke:reporting && npm --prefix apps/cloud run smoke:device-commands && npm run check:shell && npm run test:e2e
